response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 25+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior role — a severe seniority mismatch that almost always leads to retention issues, salary misalignment, and disengagement. While technical skills far exceed requirements, Java is not a primary stack (listed last among skills), insurance domain experience is absent, and German is only Basic (role requires strong German). The profile fits a senior/architect role, not a junior position.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across many languages and platforms
Strong background in agile practices, TDD, and CI/CD
Computer Science degree and active community teaching/workshops
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior position
German listed as Basic — role requires strong verbal/written German
Java is peripheral in stack; no insurance industry experience

key_factors.factor: Strong technical fundamentals and agile experience
